message:
fix(release): lower ARM64 glibc floor to 2.35 and bump to v0.2.1

- Change ARM64 Linux runner from ubuntu-24.04-arm to ubuntu-22.04-arm
  to match the x86_64 glibc 2.35 floor (was missed in 36400eb9)
- Bump version to 0.2.1 for release with all #109 fixes

Closes #109

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,8 +38,8 @@ jobs:
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
             artifact_name: cass
             asset_name: cass-linux-amd64
-          # Linux ARM64
-          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+          # Linux ARM64 — use ubuntu-22.04-arm (glibc 2.35) for broader compatibility
+          - os: ubuntu-22.04-arm
             target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
             artifact_name: cass
             asset_name: cass-linux-arm64
